ISSUE_2_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that the invoice number is missing. The extracted data shows "invoice_number: null" while there is only a receipt number present. The compliance rules require proper tax receipts or invoices.

ISSUE_3_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that additional documentation (travel reporting template and map with relevant route) is required for mileage claims. This aligns with the compliance rules which state "Travel reporting template must be submitted. Map with the relevant route (google maps is sufficient) required."

ISSUE_4_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that mileage expenses will be grossed up as per country regulations. Parking tickets taxed if paid outside of Mileage payment."

ISSUE_5_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that travel expenses must be submitted using the travel report template. This aligns with the compliance rules which state "Travel expenses must be submitted using the travel report template."

CONFIDENCE: 100
